description: Cross-language conformance for the SH5 timeline schema additions: Video.durationMs + Video.chapters[{startMs,endMs,title}] and MetaDetail.durationMs. All are skip_serializing_if-default, so a plain Stremio Video/MetaDetail without them serializes byte-identically to before SH5 (the no-regression guarantee). Chapter wire keys are startMs/endMs; the parsed fields are snake_case. end_ms is null when a chapter omits endMs.
